CONTENT.Career: Julien made his Fortuna Liga debut for AS Trenčín against Slovan Bratislava on 25 February 2017.On 17 August 2020, Julien signed for the Divizia Națională club Sheriff Tiraspol.On 2 May 2023, Julien has announced his departure from the club at the end of the season by mutual consent.
CONTENT.External links: AS Trenčín official club profileKeston Julien at SoccerwayFutbalnet Profile

SUMMARY: Keston Julien (born 26 October 1998) is a Trinidadian footballer who most recently played as a left-back for Sheriff Tiraspol.
